summary: Comprehensive testing of TLS Advocate Membership Management System completed successfully. All backend APIs (24/24 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Document verification with QR code embedding, revenue sharing model, and three-tier role system all functional.
passed_tests: - Advocate dashboard with new navigation (Stamp Document, Quick Stamps, Physical Stamps)
- Document Verification page (/documents) with upload area and stamp type selection
- Public Verification page (/verify) with all three tabs (Stamp ID, Scan QR, Upload)
- Valid stamp verification showing advocate info, document details, and status
critical_code_review_comments: Payment integration (AzamPay) is MOCKED - POST /api/payments/initiate and POST /api/payments/confirm/{payment_ref} return mock responses
Document stamps store only metadata (hash, name, pages) - actual documents are not stored on server (privacy-first design)
seed_data_creation: Test advocates created during testing with TEST_ prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_tls_api.py covers auth, document stamps, verification, admin APIs. Payment integration is mocked. Revenue sharing model configured at 30% advocate share by default.
